series_metadata.series_title: Manufactured Home Brokers, Dealers & Salespersons - licensing applications
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications, renewal forms, Division inspection checklists, photographs or memorandums resulting from the Division''s inspections or correspondence associated with a manufactured home broker, dealer or salesperson license. These records may contain tax identification numbers which are not a matter of public record pursuant to 26 USC Section 6103 & Ohio Revised Code Section 149.43(A)(1)(dd). License applications or forms are confidential pursuant to ORC Section 4781.20.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records are retained from date of receipt by Division and ; Electronic: Any records on machine readable format are be retained from date of receipt by Division and ; Microform: Any records on microfiche are be retained from date of receipt by Division and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
